login.title: Sign in to ScholarPath
login.subtitle: Welcome back. Continue where you left off.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Free. No credit card required.
register.passwordHint: At least 8 characters, 1 uppercase, 1 digit, 1 special character.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a secure reset link.
forgotPassword.success: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.invalidLink: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

onboarding.title: Welcome, let's set up your account
onboarding.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to use ScholarPath.

student.title: I'm a Student
student.body: Discover scholarships, track applications, and access AI support.

company.title: I'm a Company
company.body: Publish scholarship listings and review in-app applications. Admin review required.

consultant.title: I'm a Consultant
consultant.body: Offer paid 1:1 guidance. Admin verification required.

pending.title: Your application is under review
pending.body: An administrator will review your request shortly. You'll get full access as soon as it's approved.

documents.title: Supporting documents
documents.subtitle: Upload a business registration certificate, professional credentials, or anything that helps the reviewer verify your account. Optional, but it speeds up approval.
documents.uploadError: The file could not be uploaded.
documents.hint: PDF, Word, or image — up to 25 MB.
documents.tooLarge: The file is larger than 25 MB.

details.consultantHeading: Tell us about your consulting profile
details.companySubtitle: An admin reviews this before your company goes live.
details.consultantSubtitle: An admin reviews this before you can take bookings.
details.bioPlaceholder: A couple of sentences about your background and how you help students.
details.expertiseHint: Separate with commas — e.g. Statement of Purpose, Interview Prep.
details.required: Please fill in the required fields.

errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.ssoFailed: Sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.

verifyEmail.successBody: Your email address is confirmed — you can sign in now.
verifyEmail.errorBody: This verification link is invalid or has expired. Try signing in, or request a new link.
